$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json eval <DATA_DIR>/config/missing.star
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: open <DATA_DIR>/config/missing.star: no such file or directory
Usage:
  switchyard eval <file.star> [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for eval

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

open <DATA_DIR>/config/missing.star: no such file or directory
